history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade failed due to unresolvable assertj-bom:3.18.1 in the local Nexus and a missing assertj-core version, caused by jumping directly from SB 2.5.5 to 3.3 without an intermediate 2.7 stabilization step.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting an UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7 step under JDK 11 resolves dependency management conflicts and updates the BOM to a state compatible with modern AssertJ before the major 2.x→3.x jump. This prevents the BOM import failure and allows UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 to safely perform the Jakarta migration and JDK 17 bump.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed at upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 because the SpringFox dependency was removed or made incompatible, causing 'package springfox.documentation.builders does not exist'.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration step before the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade will replace SpringFox dependencies and code with springdoc-openapi equivalents, preventing the compilation failure caused by the missing SpringFox packages.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc recipe failed at JDK 11 because SpringFox dependencies were not properly resolved or the recipe requires a Java 17 environment to safely migrate before the Spring Boot 3 upgrade.
history.qwen_rationale: Following the observation library, I moved the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration to JDK 17 and placed it immediately before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step. I also inserted the missing UpgradeBuildToJava17 step to ensure the build targets Java 17 before attempting the Spring Boot 3 migration, which requires Java 17. This aligns with the default template and resolves the compilation failure caused by premature SpringFox removal.

history.qwen_observation: upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 removed SpringFox dependencies, causing compilation failure due to missing springfox.documentation packages.
history.qwen_rationale: Moving springfox_to_springdoc before the SB 2.7 upgrade prevents the meta-recipe from stripping SpringFox artifacts. Replacing upgrade_build_to_java17 with upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 aligns with the SB 3.x migration path, which internally handles the Java 17 build configuration. The chain now safely transitions SB 2.5 -> 2.7 -> 3.3 while purging the deprecated SpringFox library early.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration failed at JDK 11 because the recipe either didn't fully migrate the code or the dependency was stripped prematurely, and the chain skipped the explicit build upgrade to Java 17 before attempting the Spring Boot 3 migration.
history.qwen_rationale: Following the observation library, I moved the SpringFoxToSpringDoc step to JDK 17 and placed it immediately before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade. I also inserted the missing UpgradeBuildToJava17 step to properly transition the compiler and build configuration to Java 17 before running Java 17+ recipes and the SB3 migration. This ensures SpringFox is cleanly replaced by SpringDoc while the project is on a compatible JDK, preventing the 'package does not exist' compilation failure.
